The Court of Celeborn can be found within Caras Galadhon. King Thranduil has asked you to seek the counsel of Lady Galadriel in Caras Galadhon. <rg…
Lady Galadriel can be found in the Court of Celeborn. You have come to the Court of Celeborn and should now seek Lady Galadriel's counsel.
Galadriel's Garden can be found in the south-eastern reaches of Caras Galadhon. Lady Galadriel has decided to consult the Mirror of Galadriel to deter…
Lady Galadriel is standing in her garden. You have arrived at Galadriel's Garden and should now speak to Lady Galadriel and learn what she has seen.
